channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish all over the sidewalk, 25th March
item.description:
Rubbish all over the sidewalk. Not acceptable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhall Rise, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Bed Dumped on Pavement, 25th March
item.description:
A large unwanted bed has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 14. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes of Unwanted Toilet Fittings Dumped on Pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Several boxes of unwanted toilet fittings have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Carpet Dumped on Pavement, 25th March
item.description:
A large length of unwanted carpet has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 102. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus shelter opposite plumstead station, 25th March
item.description:
Huge graffiti disfiguring the entire shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: The sign has been dislodged and broken from the posts by what appears to be a collision, 25th March
item.description:
The sign has been dislodged and broken from the posts by what appears to be a collision. Please replace the sign opposite the entrance to Willett Way on Chislehurst Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing public bin close to the entrance of Anerley station, 25th March
item.description:
Also rubbish on the pavement as the result
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping as in the photo, 25th March
item.description:
Flytipping in Saxon Road at the Morgan Road end

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saxon Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In the broadway car park next to pizza express, 25th March
item.description:
Large amount of waste dumped in the broadway car park , follow alley next to pizza express, there are cameras for the pay and display
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broadway, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorcycle parked fully on the pavement outside the building, obstructing pedestrian access and in breach of London pavement parking regulations., 25th March
item.description:
Motorcycle has been parked on the pavement in this position repeatedly for around two weeks; pavement parking is illegal in London and it is obstructing access to the building entrance, reducing space for pedestrians including those with prams or mobility needs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbury Street, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge door and other bits, 25th March
item.description:
Been there for weeks, already reported to Lewisham Council via their preferred route. No action has been taken yet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambleside, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Animal traps & rubbish, 25th March
item.description:
I am particularly concerned that the materials include sharp, rusted, and potentially dangerous objects, and that unsecured waste is now escaping the property and affecting the surrounding area. I believe this may pose a risk to health and safety and could attract vermin or pests if not addressed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Holbeach Gardens, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish at the bus stop, 25th March
item.description:
Sorry more dumped rubbish at the bus stop outside 121 Okehampton and also in the footpath next to 121 Okehampton crescent This is happening two or three times a week at the moment Sorry

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Okehampton Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Again rubbish left on the street from 67 Queens drive, 25th March
item.description:
This has now become a weekly issue, and every week from the front garden of 67 Queens drive some new rubbish and furniture is dumped straight onto the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raw bleach, 25th March
item.description:
There is constantly raw bleach being poured onto the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Credon Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes obstructing pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Yesterday there was one, now there are two. We need a defined area where people can leave them as there is in other areas of the borough. Asap!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not pothole . Street light has no shade, 25th March
item.description:
This is not a pot hole problem , street lighting in lawn road beckenham junction of law riad and Copers cope road Light has no shade , guard , shine directly into my home lounge and bedroom , we have reported this by phone

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawn Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish thrown in street, 25th March
item.description:
Rubbish in road and on pavement outside number 16 Macoma Terrace

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Macoma Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aston Martin with damage parked near us for weeks, 25th March
item.description:
We notice there is a car of high value which has been parked almost opposite our house for at least 3 weeks. The wing mirror has been knocked off and the tyres look pretty flat. We wonder if it is a stolen and abandoned vehicle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodway Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin collection, 25th March
item.description:
Black bin waste not collected from rear of 63 Woodcote Drive Crofton Estate Orpington
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodcote Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
